# holistics_user_attribute (Resource)

A Holistics user attribute (custom or system).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `attribute_type` (String) Attribute data type (e.g. `string`, `number`, `boolean`).
- `label` (String) Display label.
- `name` (String) Internal name of the attribute.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Optional description.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) User attribute ID.
- `is_system_attribute` (Boolean) True for built-in system attributes.
